Resource Profile: SE EHDS Condition – Diagnos (GetDiagnosis)

Official URL: https://fhir.inera.se/ig/ehds-tk/StructureDefinition/inera-ehds-condition-diagnosis Version: 0.1.0
Draft as of 2026-06-24 Computable Name: IneraEHDSConditionDiagnosis

Profil för diagnos/problem mappat från RIVTA-tjänstekontraktet GetDiagnosis (clinicalprocess:healthcond:description v2.0). Täcker NPÖ 2.0 och 1177 Journal 2.0.

Användningar:

  • Denna Profil används inte av några profiler i denna implementationsguide

Du kan också kontrollera användningar i FHIR IG-statistiken

Formal Views of Profile Content

Description of Profiles, Differentials, Snapshots and how the different presentations work.

  • Key Elements Table
  • Differential Table
  • Snapshot Table
  • Statistics/References
  • All

Begränsningar
Bindningar
Skyldigheter
Condition C 0..* ConditionUvIps(2.0.0) Documentation of a health problem of the patient
Constraints: con-3, con-4, con-5
meta Σ 0..1 Meta Metadata about the resource
source SΣ 0..1 uri Källsystem HSA-id (diagnosisHeader.sourceSystemHSAId) – urn:oid:1.2.752.129.2.1.4.1#{hsaId}
implicitRules ?!Σ 0..1 uri A set of rules under which this content was created
Skivor för extension 0..* Extension Extension
Skiva: Oordnad, Öppen av value:url
extension:assertedDate S 0..1 dateTime Date the allergy, intolerance, condition, problem, or diagnosis or other event, situation, issue, or clinical concept was first asserted
URL: http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/condition-assertedDate
modifierExtension ?! 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored
clinicalStatus ?!SOΣC 0..1 CodeableConceptIPS(2.0.0) Alltid 'active' – härledd (inget statusfält i TKBn)
Bindning: ConditionClinicalStatusCodes (required): The clinical status of the condition or diagnosis.
SkyldigheterAktörKälla
SHALL:populate-if-known Creator (IPS) from Condition (IPS)
SHALL:handle Consumer (IPS) from Condition (IPS)
SHOULD:display Consumer (IPS) from Condition (IPS)
verificationStatus ?!SΣC 0..1 CodeableConcept Alltid confirmed (RIVTA-svar representerar bekräftade journaluppgifter)
Bindning: ConditionVerificationStatus (required): The verification status to support or decline the clinical status of the condition or diagnosis.
Skivor för category SO 1..* CodeableConceptIPS(2.0.0) problem-list-item | encounter-diagnosis
Skiva: Oordnad, Öppen av value:coding.system
Bindning: Problem Type - IPS (extensible)
Ytterligare bindningarSyfte
Problem Type (LOINC) candidate

Skivor för onset[x] SOΣ 0..1 Estimated or actual date, date-time, or age
Skiva: Oordnad, Sluten av type:$this
SkyldigheterAktörKälla
SHALL:populate-if-known Creator (IPS) from Condition (IPS)
SHALL:handle Consumer (IPS) from Condition (IPS)
SHOULD:display Consumer (IPS) from Condition (IPS)
onsetDateTime dateTime
onsetAge Age
onsetPeriod Period
onsetRange Range
onsetString string
onset[x]:onsetDateTime SOΣ 0..1 dateTime S Bedömningstidpunkt (diagnosisBody.diagnosisTime) – YYYYMMDDHHMMSS → ISO 8601
SkyldigheterAktörKälla
SHOULD:able-to-populate Creator (IPS) from Condition (IPS)
SHALL:handle Consumer (IPS) from Condition (IPS)
SHOULD:display Consumer (IPS) from Condition (IPS)
recordedDate SΣ 0..1 dateTime Registreringstidpunkt (diagnosisHeader.accountableHealthcareProfessional.authorTime) – YYYYMMDDHHMMSS → ISO 8601
recorder SΣ 0..1 Reference(PractitionerRole) Ansvarig personal (diagnosisHeader.accountableHealthcareProfessional) – logisk referens via HSA-id
asserter SΣ 0..1 Reference(PractitionerRole) Rättslig äkthetsintygsgivare (diagnosisHeader.legalAuthenticator) – logisk referens via HSA-id

Dokumentation för detta format

Terminologibindningar

Sökväg Status Användning ValueSet Version Källa
Condition.clinicalStatus Base required Condition Clinical Status Codes 📍4.0.1 FHIR-std.
Condition.verificationStatus Base required ConditionVerificationStatus 📍4.0.1 FHIR-std.
Condition.category Base extensible Problem Type - IPS 📦2.0.0 International Patient Summary Implementation Guide v2.0
Condition.category:diagnostyp Base extensible Problem Type - IPS 📦2.0.0 International Patient Summary Implementation Guide v2.0
Condition.severity Base preferred Condition/Diagnosis Severity 📦4.0.1 FHIR-std.
Condition.code Base preferred Problems - IPS 📦2.0.0 International Patient Summary Implementation Guide v2.0

Begränsningar

Id Grad Sökväg(ar) Beskrivning Uttryck
con-3 bästa praxis Condition Condition.clinicalStatus SHALL be present if verificationStatus is not entered-in-error and category is problem-list-item clinicalStatus.exists() or verificationStatus.coding.where(system='http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/condition-ver-status' and code = 'entered-in-error').exists() or category.select($this='problem-list-item').empty()
con-4 error Condition If condition is abated, then clinicalStatus must be either inactive, resolved, or remission abatement.empty() or clinicalStatus.coding.where(system='http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/condition-clinical' and (code='resolved' or code='remission' or code='inactive')).exists()
con-5 error Condition Condition.clinicalStatus SHALL NOT be present if verification Status is entered-in-error verificationStatus.coding.where(system='http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/condition-ver-status' and code='entered-in-error').empty() or clinicalStatus.empty()
dom-2 error Condition If the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT contain nested Resources contained.contained.empty()
dom-3 error Condition If the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL be referred to from elsewhere in the resource or SHALL refer to the containing resource contained.where((('#'+id in (%resource.descendants().reference | %resource.descendants().as(canonical) | %resource.descendants().as(uri) | %resource.descendants().as(url))) or descendants().where(reference = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists()).not()).trace('unmatched', id).empty()
dom-4 error Condition If a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a meta.versionId or a meta.lastUpdated contained.meta.versionId.empty() and contained.meta.lastUpdated.empty()
dom-5 error Condition If a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a security label contained.meta.security.empty()
dom-6 bästa praxis Condition A resource should have narrative for robust management text.`div`.exists()
ele-1 error **ALLA** element All FHIR elements must have a @value or children hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())
ext-1 error **ALLA** extensions Must have either extensions or value[x], not both extension.exists() != value.exists()

This structure is derived from ConditionUvIps

profile Σ 0..* canonical(StructureDefinition) Profiles this resource claims to conform to
security Σ 0..* Coding Security Labels applied to this resource
Bindning: All Security Labels (extensible): Security Labels from the Healthcare Privacy and Security Classification System.
tag Σ 0..* Coding Tags applied to this resource
Bindning: CommonTags (example): Codes that represent various types of tags, commonly workflow-related; e.g. "Needs review by Dr. Jones".
implicitRules ?!Σ 0..1 uri A set of rules under which this content was created
language 0..1 code Language of the resource content
Bindning: CommonLanguages (preferred): A human language.

AllLanguages Maxbindning
text 0..1 Narrative Text summary of the resource, for human interpretation

contained 0..* Resource Contained, inline Resources

type Σ 0..1 uri Type the reference refers to (e.g. "Patient")
Bindning: ResourceType (extensible): Aa resource (or, for logical models, the URI of the logical model).
identifier Σ 0..1 Identifier Logical reference, when literal reference is not known
display Σ 0..1 string Text alternative for the resource
encounter Σ 0..1 Reference(Encounter) Encounter created as part of
Skivor för onset[x] SOΣ 0..1 Estimated or actual date, date-time, or age
Skiva: Oordnad, Sluten av type:$this
SkyldigheterAktörKälla
SHALL:populate-if-known Creator (IPS) from Condition (IPS)
SHALL:handle Consumer (IPS) from Condition (IPS)
SHOULD:display Consumer (IPS) from Condition (IPS)
onsetDateTime dateTime
onsetAge Age
onsetPeriod Period
onsetRange Range
onsetString string
onset[x]:onsetDateTime SOΣ 0..1 dateTime S Bedömningstidpunkt (diagnosisBody.diagnosisTime) – YYYYMMDDHHMMSS → ISO 8601
SkyldigheterAktörKälla
SHOULD:able-to-populate Creator (IPS) from Condition (IPS)
SHALL:handle Consumer (IPS) from Condition (IPS)
SHOULD:display Consumer (IPS) from Condition (IPS)
abatement[x] C 0..1 When in resolution/remission
abatementDateTime dateTime
abatementAge Age
abatementPeriod Period
abatementRange Range
abatementString string
recordedDate SΣ 0..1 dateTime Registreringstidpunkt (diagnosisHeader.accountableHealthcareProfessional.authorTime) – YYYYMMDDHHMMSS → ISO 8601
recorder SΣ 0..1 Reference(PractitionerRole) Ansvarig personal (diagnosisHeader.accountableHealthcareProfessional) – logisk referens via HSA-id
asserter SΣ 0..1 Reference(PractitionerRole) Rättslig äkthetsintygsgivare (diagnosisHeader.legalAuthenticator) – logisk referens via HSA-id
stage C 0..* BackboneElement Stage/grade, usually assessed formally
Constraints: con-1
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
modifierExtension ?!Σ 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
summary C 0..1 CodeableConcept Simple summary (disease specific)
Bindning: ConditionStage (example): Codes describing condition stages (e.g. Cancer stages).
assessment C 0..* Reference(ClinicalImpression | DiagnosticReport | Observation) Formal record of assessment
type 0..1 CodeableConcept Kind of staging
Bindning: ConditionStageType (example): Codes describing the kind of condition staging (e.g. clinical or pathological).
evidence C 0..* BackboneElement Supporting evidence
Constraints: con-2
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
modifierExtension ?!Σ 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
code ΣC 0..* CodeableConcept Manifestation/symptom
Bindning: ManifestationAndSymptomCodes (example): Codes that describe the manifestation or symptoms of a condition.
detail ΣC 0..* Reference(Resource) Supporting information found elsewhere
note 0..* Annotation Additional information about the Condition

Dokumentation för detta format

Terminologibindningar

Sökväg Status Användning ValueSet Version Källa
Condition.meta.security Base extensible SecurityLabels 📍4.0.1 FHIR-std.
Condition.meta.tag Base example Common Tags 📍4.0.1 FHIR-std.
Condition.language Base preferred Common Languages 📍4.0.1 FHIR-std.
Condition.clinicalStatus Base required Condition Clinical Status Codes 📍4.0.1 FHIR-std.
Condition.verificationStatus Base required ConditionVerificationStatus 📍4.0.1 FHIR-std.
Condition.category Base extensible Problem Type - IPS 📦2.0.0 International Patient Summary Implementation Guide v2.0
Condition.category:diagnostyp Base extensible Problem Type - IPS 📦2.0.0 International Patient Summary Implementation Guide v2.0
Condition.severity Base preferred Condition/Diagnosis Severity 📦4.0.1 FHIR-std.
Condition.code Base preferred Problems - IPS 📦2.0.0 International Patient Summary Implementation Guide v2.0
Condition.bodySite Base preferred SNOMED CT Body Structures 📦4.0.1 FHIR-std.
Condition.subject.type Base extensible ResourceType 📍4.0.1 FHIR-std.
Condition.stage.summary Base example Condition Stage 📍4.0.1 FHIR-std.
Condition.stage.type Base example Condition Stage Type 📍4.0.1 FHIR-std.
Condition.evidence.code Base example Manifestation and Symptom Codes 📍4.0.1 FHIR-std.

Begränsningar

Id Grad Sökväg(ar) Beskrivning Uttryck
con-1 error Condition.stage Stage SHALL have summary or assessment summary.exists() or assessment.exists()
con-2 error Condition.evidence evidence SHALL have code or details code.exists() or detail.exists()
con-3 bästa praxis Condition Condition.clinicalStatus SHALL be present if verificationStatus is not entered-in-error and category is problem-list-item clinicalStatus.exists() or verificationStatus.coding.where(system='http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/condition-ver-status' and code = 'entered-in-error').exists() or category.select($this='problem-list-item').empty()
con-4 error Condition If condition is abated, then clinicalStatus must be either inactive, resolved, or remission abatement.empty() or clinicalStatus.coding.where(system='http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/condition-clinical' and (code='resolved' or code='remission' or code='inactive')).exists()
con-5 error Condition Condition.clinicalStatus SHALL NOT be present if verification Status is entered-in-error verificationStatus.coding.where(system='http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/condition-ver-status' and code='entered-in-error').empty() or clinicalStatus.empty()
dom-2 error Condition If the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT contain nested Resources contained.contained.empty()
dom-3 error Condition If the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL be referred to from elsewhere in the resource or SHALL refer to the containing resource contained.where((('#'+id in (%resource.descendants().reference | %resource.descendants().as(canonical) | %resource.descendants().as(uri) | %resource.descendants().as(url))) or descendants().where(reference = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists()).not()).trace('unmatched', id).empty()
dom-4 error Condition If a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a meta.versionId or a meta.lastUpdated contained.meta.versionId.empty() and contained.meta.lastUpdated.empty()
dom-5 error Condition If a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a security label contained.meta.security.empty()
dom-6 bästa praxis Condition A resource should have narrative for robust management text.`div`.exists()
ele-1 error **ALLA** element All FHIR elements must have a @value or children hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())
ext-1 error **ALLA** extensions Must have either extensions or value[x], not both extension.exists() != value.exists()

This structure is derived from ConditionUvIps

Sammanfattning

Obligatorisk: 5 elements(1 nästlade obligatoriska element)
Måste stödjas: 9 elements

Strukturer

Denna struktur refererar till dessa andra strukturer:

  • SE EHDS Patient (https://fhir.inera.se/ig/ehds-tk/StructureDefinition/inera-ehds-patient)

Extensions

Denna struktur refererar till dessa extensions:

  • http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/condition-assertedDate

Skivor

Denna struktur definierar följande skivor:

  • Elementet 1 är uppdelat baserat på värdet av Condition.category
  • Elementet 1 är uppdelat baserat på värdet av Condition.code.coding
  • Elementet 1 är uppdelat baserat på värdet av Condition.onset[x]

Bindningar

Id Grad Sökväg(ar) Beskrivning Uttryck
con-3 bästa praxis Condition Condition.clinicalStatus SHALL be present if verificationStatus is not entered-in-error and category is problem-list-item clinicalStatus.exists() or verificationStatus.coding.where(system='http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/condition-ver-status' and code = 'entered-in-error').exists() or category.select($this='problem-list-item').empty()
con-4 error Condition If condition is abated, then clinicalStatus must be either inactive, resolved, or remission abatement.empty() or clinicalStatus.coding.where(system='http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/condition-clinical' and (code='resolved' or code='remission' or code='inactive')).exists()
con-5 error Condition Condition.clinicalStatus SHALL NOT be present if verification Status is entered-in-error verificationStatus.coding.where(system='http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/condition-ver-status' and code='entered-in-error').empty() or clinicalStatus.empty()
dom-2 error Condition If the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT contain nested Resources contained.contained.empty()
dom-3 error Condition If the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL be referred to from elsewhere in the resource or SHALL refer to the containing resource contained.where((('#'+id in (%resource.descendants().reference | %resource.descendants().as(canonical) | %resource.descendants().as(uri) | %resource.descendants().as(url))) or descendants().where(reference = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists()).not()).trace('unmatched', id).empty()
dom-4 error Condition If a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a meta.versionId or a meta.lastUpdated contained.meta.versionId.empty() and contained.meta.lastUpdated.empty()
dom-5 error Condition If a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a security label contained.meta.security.empty()
dom-6 bästa praxis Condition A resource should have narrative for robust management text.`div`.exists()
ele-1 error **ALLA** element All FHIR elements must have a @value or children hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())
ext-1 error **ALLA** extensions Must have either extensions or value[x], not both extension.exists() != value.exists()

Condition C 0..* ConditionUvIps(2.0.0) Documentation of a health problem of the patient
Constraints: con-3, con-4, con-5
id Σ 0..1 id Logical id of this artifact
meta Σ 0..1 Meta Metadata about the resource
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
Skiva: Oordnad, Öppen av value:url
versionId Σ 0..1 id Version specific identifier
lastUpdated Σ 0..1 instant When the resource version last changed
source SΣ 0..1 uri Källsystem HSA-id (diagnosisHeader.sourceSystemHSAId) – urn:oid:1.2.752.129.2.1.4.1#{hsaId}
profile Σ 0..* canonical(StructureDefinition) Profiles this resource claims to conform to
security Σ 0..* Coding Security Labels applied to this resource
Bindning: All Security Labels (extensible): Security Labels from the Healthcare Privacy and Security Classification System.
tag Σ 0..* Coding Tags applied to this resource
Bindning: CommonTags (example): Codes that represent various types of tags, commonly workflow-related; e.g. "Needs review by Dr. Jones".
implicitRules ?!Σ 0..1 uri A set of rules under which this content was created
language 0..1 code Language of the resource content
Bindning: CommonLanguages (preferred): A human language.
Ytterligare bindningarSyfte
AllLanguages Maxbindning
text 0..1 Narrative Text summary of the resource, for human interpretation
This profile does not constrain the narrative in regard to content, language, or traceability to data elements
contained 0..* Resource Contained, inline Resources

Skivor för extension Innehåll/regler för alla skivor
extension:translation 0..* (Komplex) Language Translation (Localization)
URL: http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/translation
value 0..1 string Primitive value for string
Maxlängd:1048576
severity SO 0..1 CodeableConceptIPS(2.0.0) Subjective severity of condition
Bindning: Condition/DiagnosisSeverity (preferred)
SkyldigheterAktörKälla
SHALL:populate-if-known Creator (IPS) from Condition (IPS)
SHALL:handle Consumer (IPS) from Condition (IPS)
SHOULD:display Consumer (IPS) from Condition (IPS)
code SOΣ 1..1 CodeableConceptIPS(2.0.0) Diagnoskod (diagnosisBody.diagnosisCode)
Bindning: Problems - IPS (preferred): Code for a clinical problem (or absent/unknown problem) that is selected from SNOMED CT
SkyldigheterAktörKälla
SHALL:populate-if-known Creator (IPS) from Condition (IPS)
SHALL:handle Consumer (IPS) from Condition (IPS)
SHOULD:display Consumer (IPS) from Condition (IPS)
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
Skiva: Oordnad, Öppen av value:url
Skivor för coding SOΣ 0..* CodingIPS(2.0.0) Code defined by a terminology system
Skiva: Oordnad, Öppen av value:system
SkyldigheterAktörKälla
SHALL:populate-if-known Creator (IPS) from Codeable Concept (IPS)
SHALL:handle Consumer (IPS) from Codeable Concept (IPS)
coding:ICD10SE SOΣ 0..1 CodingIPS(2.0.0) Code defined by a terminology system
SkyldigheterAktörKälla
SHALL:populate-if-known Creator (IPS) from Codeable Concept (IPS)
SHALL:handle Consumer (IPS) from Codeable Concept (IPS)
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
Skiva: Oordnad, Öppen av value:url
system SOΣ 1..1 uri Identity of the terminology system
Obligatoriskt mönster: https://www.icd10.se/
SkyldigheterAktörKälla
SHALL:populate-if-known Creator (IPS) from Coding with translations
SHALL:handle Consumer (IPS) from Coding with translations
version Σ 0..1 string Version of the system - if relevant
code SOΣ 0..1 code ICD-10-SE kod (diagnosisBody.diagnosisCode.code)
SkyldigheterAktörKälla
SHALL:populate-if-known Creator (IPS) from Coding with translations
SHALL:handle Consumer (IPS) from Coding with translations
display Σ 0..1 string Kodbenämning (diagnosisBody.diagnosisCode.displayName)
id 0..1 string xml:id (or equivalent in JSON)
Skivor för extension 0..* Extension Extension
Skiva: Oordnad, Öppen av value:url
Skivor för extension Innehåll/regler för alla skivor
extension:translation 0..* (Komplex) Language Translation (Localization)
URL: http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/translation
value 0..1 string Primitive value for string
Maxlängd:1048576
userSelected Σ 0..1 boolean If this coding was chosen directly by the user
text SOΣ 0..1 string Fritext (diagnosisBody.diagnosisCode.originalText) – fallback: displayName
SkyldigheterAktörKälla
SHALL:populate-if-known Creator (IPS) from Codeable Concept (IPS)
SHALL:handle Consumer (IPS) from Codeable Concept (IPS)
SHOULD:display Consumer (IPS) from Codeable Concept (IPS)
id 0..1 string xml:id (or equivalent in JSON)
Skivor för extension 0..* Extension Extension
Skiva: Oordnad, Öppen av value:url
extension:translation 0..* (Komplex) Language Translation (Localization)
URL: http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/translation
value 0..1 string Primitive value for string
Maxlängd:1048576
bodySite Σ 0..* CodeableConcept Anatomical location, if relevant
Bindning: SNOMEDCTBodyStructures (preferred)
subject SOΣ 1..1 Reference(SE EHDS Patient) Patient (diagnosisHeader.patientId) – OID→URI för personnummer/samordningsnummer
SkyldigheterAktörKälla
SHALL:populate-if-known Creator (IPS) from Condition (IPS)
SHALL:handle Consumer (IPS) from Condition (IPS)
SHOULD:display Consumer (IPS) from Condition (IPS)
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
Skiva: Oordnad, Öppen av value:url
reference SOΣC 1..1 string Literal reference, Relative, internal or absolute URL
SkyldigheterAktörKälla
SHALL:populate-if-known Creator (IPS) from Condition (IPS)
SHALL:handle Consumer (IPS) from Condition (IPS)
type Σ 0..1 uri Type the reference refers to (e.g. "Patient")
Bindning: ResourceType (extensible): Aa resource (or, for logical models, the URI of the logical model).
identifier Σ 0..1 Identifier Logical reference, when literal reference is not known
display Σ 0..1 string Text alternative for the resource
encounter Σ 0..1 Reference(Encounter) Encounter created as part of
Skivor för onset[x] SOΣ 0..1 Estimated or actual date, date-time, or age
Skiva: Oordnad, Sluten av type:$this
SkyldigheterAktörKälla
SHALL:populate-if-known Creator (IPS) from Condition (IPS)
SHALL:handle Consumer (IPS) from Condition (IPS)
SHOULD:display Consumer (IPS) from Condition (IPS)
onsetDateTime dateTime
onsetAge Age
onsetPeriod Period
onsetRange Range
onsetString string
onset[x]:onsetDateTime SOΣ 0..1 dateTime S Bedömningstidpunkt (diagnosisBody.diagnosisTime) – YYYYMMDDHHMMSS → ISO 8601
SkyldigheterAktörKälla
SHOULD:able-to-populate Creator (IPS) from Condition (IPS)
SHALL:handle Consumer (IPS) from Condition (IPS)
SHOULD:display Consumer (IPS) from Condition (IPS)
abatement[x] C 0..1 When in resolution/remission
abatementDateTime dateTime
abatementAge Age
abatementPeriod Period
abatementRange Range
abatementString string
recordedDate SΣ 0..1 dateTime Registreringstidpunkt (diagnosisHeader.accountableHealthcareProfessional.authorTime) – YYYYMMDDHHMMSS → ISO 8601
recorder SΣ 0..1 Reference(PractitionerRole) Ansvarig personal (diagnosisHeader.accountableHealthcareProfessional) – logisk referens via HSA-id
asserter SΣ 0..1 Reference(PractitionerRole) Rättslig äkthetsintygsgivare (diagnosisHeader.legalAuthenticator) – logisk referens via HSA-id
stage C 0..* BackboneElement Stage/grade, usually assessed formally
Constraints: con-1
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
modifierExtension ?!Σ 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
summary C 0..1 CodeableConcept Simple summary (disease specific)
Bindning: ConditionStage (example): Codes describing condition stages (e.g. Cancer stages).
assessment C 0..* Reference(ClinicalImpression | DiagnosticReport | Observation) Formal record of assessment
type 0..1 CodeableConcept Kind of staging
Bindning: ConditionStageType (example): Codes describing the kind of condition staging (e.g. clinical or pathological).
evidence C 0..* BackboneElement Supporting evidence
Constraints: con-2
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
modifierExtension ?!Σ 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
code ΣC 0..* CodeableConcept Manifestation/symptom
Bindning: ManifestationAndSymptomCodes (example): Codes that describe the manifestation or symptoms of a condition.
detail ΣC 0..* Reference(Resource) Supporting information found elsewhere
note 0..* Annotation Additional information about the Condition

Dokumentation för detta format

Terminologibindningar

Sökväg Status Användning ValueSet Version Källa
Condition.meta.security Base extensible SecurityLabels 📍4.0.1 FHIR-std.
Condition.meta.tag Base example Common Tags 📍4.0.1 FHIR-std.
Condition.language Base preferred Common Languages 📍4.0.1 FHIR-std.
Condition.clinicalStatus Base required Condition Clinical Status Codes 📍4.0.1 FHIR-std.
Condition.verificationStatus Base required ConditionVerificationStatus 📍4.0.1 FHIR-std.
Condition.category Base extensible Problem Type - IPS 📦2.0.0 International Patient Summary Implementation Guide v2.0
Condition.category:diagnostyp Base extensible Problem Type - IPS 📦2.0.0 International Patient Summary Implementation Guide v2.0
Condition.severity Base preferred Condition/Diagnosis Severity 📦4.0.1 FHIR-std.
Condition.code Base preferred Problems - IPS 📦2.0.0 International Patient Summary Implementation Guide v2.0
Condition.bodySite Base preferred SNOMED CT Body Structures 📦4.0.1 FHIR-std.
Condition.subject.type Base extensible ResourceType 📍4.0.1 FHIR-std.
Condition.stage.summary Base example Condition Stage 📍4.0.1 FHIR-std.
Condition.stage.type Base example Condition Stage Type 📍4.0.1 FHIR-std.
Condition.evidence.code Base example Manifestation and Symptom Codes 📍4.0.1 FHIR-std.

Begränsningar

Id Grad Sökväg(ar) Beskrivning Uttryck
con-1 error Condition.stage Stage SHALL have summary or assessment summary.exists() or assessment.exists()
con-2 error Condition.evidence evidence SHALL have code or details code.exists() or detail.exists()
con-3 bästa praxis Condition Condition.clinicalStatus SHALL be present if verificationStatus is not entered-in-error and category is problem-list-item clinicalStatus.exists() or verificationStatus.coding.where(system='http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/condition-ver-status' and code = 'entered-in-error').exists() or category.select($this='problem-list-item').empty()
con-4 error Condition If condition is abated, then clinicalStatus must be either inactive, resolved, or remission abatement.empty() or clinicalStatus.coding.where(system='http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/condition-clinical' and (code='resolved' or code='remission' or code='inactive')).exists()
con-5 error Condition Condition.clinicalStatus SHALL NOT be present if verification Status is entered-in-error verificationStatus.coding.where(system='http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/condition-ver-status' and code='entered-in-error').empty() or clinicalStatus.empty()
dom-2 error Condition If the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT contain nested Resources contained.contained.empty()
dom-3 error Condition If the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL be referred to from elsewhere in the resource or SHALL refer to the containing resource contained.where((('#'+id in (%resource.descendants().reference | %resource.descendants().as(canonical) | %resource.descendants().as(uri) | %resource.descendants().as(url))) or descendants().where(reference = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists()).not()).trace('unmatched', id).empty()
dom-4 error Condition If a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a meta.versionId or a meta.lastUpdated contained.meta.versionId.empty() and contained.meta.lastUpdated.empty()
dom-5 error Condition If a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a security label contained.meta.security.empty()
dom-6 bästa praxis Condition A resource should have narrative for robust management text.`div`.exists()
ele-1 error **ALLA** element All FHIR elements must have a @value or children hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())
ext-1 error **ALLA** extensions Must have either extensions or value[x], not both extension.exists() != value.exists()

This structure is derived from ConditionUvIps

Sammanfattning

Obligatorisk: 5 elements(1 nästlade obligatoriska element)
Måste stödjas: 9 elements

Strukturer

Denna struktur refererar till dessa andra strukturer:

  • SE EHDS Patient (https://fhir.inera.se/ig/ehds-tk/StructureDefinition/inera-ehds-patient)

Extensions

Denna struktur refererar till dessa extensions:

  • http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/condition-assertedDate

Skivor

Denna struktur definierar följande skivor:

  • Elementet 1 är uppdelat baserat på värdet av Condition.category
  • Elementet 1 är uppdelat baserat på värdet av Condition.code.coding
  • Elementet 1 är uppdelat baserat på värdet av Condition.onset[x]

 

Other representations of profile: CSV, Excel, Schematron
